title: Shared state
description: Small stores, atoms, Redux, RTK Query, and TanStack Store.

title: AI, data, and routing
description: Streaming AI, GraphQL, server state, live IndexedDB data, type-safe routes, and React Router-style APIs.

title: UI and interaction
description: Primitives, positioning, motion, drag and drop, toasts, command menus, and icons.

title: Forms and content
description: Forms, rich-text editing, MDX, and translations.

title: Data-heavy screens
description: Tables, large virtual lists, charts, and visualization primitives.

title: Web 3D
description: Technical-preview, React Three Fiber-style scene graphs on Octane's universal renderer.

title: Styling, tests, and devtools
description: Compiled StyleX, runtime styled-components, DOM-first component tests, and the TanStack Devtools panel.
